results.content: Founded by Wan Mohamad Hidayat and Khairina Ibrahim, the centre also provides support to the local cat rescue community. To visit or schedule a private appointment, check out luma.com/kolektifkucing or DM via IG @kolektifkucing or email kolektifkucing@gmail.com Story...
results.caption: At Kolektif Kucing, rescued cats find a future Kolektif Kucing is a foster space in Kuala Lumpur where rescued cats await adoption. Founded by Wan Mohamad Hidayat and Khairina Ibrahim, the centre also provides support to the local cat rescue community. To visit or schedule a private appointment, check out luma.com/kolektifkucing or DM via IG @kolektifkucing or email kolektifkucing@gmail.com Story by: @tegence18 Shot by: @banijamian Edited by: @iamshals_ #FMTLifestyle

results.caption: Cats for Adoption. Thank you for showing some love to them. 🐾 Pawsome Ekspo Kucing at MATRADE 🐾 🎉 Meowvelous Moments Ahead! 🎉 🐱 Feline lovers, get ready to be whiskered away by the purrfect products showcased at our Cat-tastic Exhibition! 🐾 From luxurious cat trees to adorable kitty toys, we’ve got everything your feline friend dreams of! . 𝗘𝗸𝘀𝗽𝗼 𝗞𝘂𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟯 - 𝟲𝘁𝗵 𝗘𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻👇 📆 4-6 August 2023 🕚 10am - 9pm 📍 MATRADE Exhibition and Convention Centre 🎟 Entrance Fee: RM5 per adult.
